variants: Firdous Fayyaz was born in Songbird Passage, a quaint locale known for its vibrant community. Currently, he resides in Driftwing Orchard, where he explores his passion for the art of soap making. Firdous is a dedicated member of the Copperleaf Soapmakers Guild, engaging with fellow artisans to perfect their craft. His notable contributions to the field have been recognized, earning him the prestigious Jade Lantern Prize. He is also the author of an innovative work titled Mirage Lens Theory, which has garnered attention in academic and practical circles alike.
